text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
We have four forms of the first-person pronoun so far—I, my, mine,
and myself. Name the last one, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, right! ...Wait, what?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The answer is "me," Spe. M-E.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Me? Ah, right! The answer is King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Special Week, King Halo... Expect extra homework for this...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pheeew, I'm stuffed. That grated yam really hit the spot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Spe? Something up?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no! I'm totally fine! But I guess I should dig in before my food gets
cold!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, huh?! Where'd all my food go?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh, you ate it all at breakneck speed, remember?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! Time to get this training show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! No way I can sit still after seeing you, Spe! Not when you're
literally wearing your motivation like a badge of honor!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! You must be super serious about practice to come dressed in
your signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: AH?! I-I wore the wrong running outfit!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It wasn’t intentional?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'm guessing you told her about your plans.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, last night. She was shocked, to say the least.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We could have figured that out just by looking at her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka revealed her desire to run abroad to me around the
turn of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever the curious one, Silence Suzuka's eyes began to wander overseas
after achieving so much in the Twinkle Series here in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I have no reason to deny her ambitions. I plan on doing
whatever I can to make her goals possible. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've been friends with Special Week since her first days at the
academy, so I knew she would be affected, but this is...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over and see a cloud of guilt looming over Silence Suzuka. She
clearly cares deeply for her friend, but we need to put her needs first.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I know what you're thinking, but don't worry. The rest of the team and
I will be here to cheer Spe on.
choice_data_list: Just like we'll be doing for you.
Just like we'll be doing for you.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I know what you're thinking, but don't worry. The rest of the team and
I will be here to cheer Spe on.
choice_data_list: Just like we'll be doing for you.
Just like we'll be doing for you.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, since Spe's already wearing her racewear, why don't you all
get changed? We could use a change of pace!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what an amusing idea. I can already hear the rumors among the
other teams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka... We are Team Sirius, a team that props up our racers as they
reach for their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: As they reach for their dreams...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, why don't you change into your signature racewear as well?
You'll need all the extra spirit you can get if you want to succeed
overseas.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I should take in as much of this scenery as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now then, to finish up, let's do one final lap around the track.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Phew! Now that was some good training!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Good work, everyone...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Even after all this time, Suzuka's running hasn't changed at all...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I want to run just like her... And to do that, I need to watch her run as
much as I can.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (But... I can't do that if she's abroad...)
